title: Bilobodera flexa gen n, sp n Nematoda Heteroderidae from Andhra Pradesh, India
abstract: Bilobodera flexa gen.n., sp.n. from soils and roots of Allmania nodiflora(L) in Andhra Pradesh, India, is described and illustrayed. Bilobdera gen.n. belongs to Verutinae of Heteroderiade and is charecterised by bilobed females with a sharp dorsal depression opposite the median...................
